"'''The Gree Enclave'''" was an article published in [[Star Wars Adventure Journal 8|''Star Wars Adventure Journal'' 8]], written by [[Timothy S. O'Brien]]. It was reprinted in ''[[Classic Adventures: Volume Four — The Best of the Journal]]''. It detailed the [[Gree (species)/Legends|Gree]] species and their exclusionist zone, the [[Gree Enclave/Legends|Gree Enclave]].
